items.title: Tour Montparnasse Is One of Paris’s Uglier Landmarks. It’s Getting a Makeover.
items.description: The Tour Montparnasse is one of Paris’s least-loved landmarks. After half a century, it’s finally being remodeled.

items.title: This Exercise Research Tells Us Nothing
